quote: The lamb chop here is honestly the best in Wangsa Maju. Plated beautifully, tastes even better. My family comes here every month for birthdays.
name: Aisyah R.

quote: I keep telling people: this place serves hotel-level presentation at mamak prices. The sirloin was perfectly cooked and the bill was under RM40.
name: Daniel T.

quote: Late night gem. Open till midnight, great for post-movie dinners. The seafood olio is my go-to. Staff is friendly and the vibe is cozy.
name: Farhan M.
